message:
fix(server): pre-compute thread URLs, add XSS regression tests, fix indentation

- Introduce thread_url field on InboxMessage so templates receive
  server-built URLs instead of constructing them client-side
- Add html_contains_url helper for URL assertion that handles HTML
  entity escaping
- Add tests verifying client-side markdown fallback is not rendered
  (render_message and unified_inbox)
- Fix match arm indentation in cleanup.rs and unwrap_or_else
  formatting in startup_checks.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
